title: Pilot question bank end-to-end for one OER unit
context: The M0 milestone culminates in one pilot bank that proves the entire authoring pipeline end-to-end: source gating → blueprint → item authoring in the canonical model → CI machine gate → human sign-offs → contribution to the beneficiary. The pilot OER unit must be selected from the outreach-008 shortlist on a realistic adoption path (informal channel or self-serve fallback), using a clearly permissive license and a non-regulated subject. All M0 foundation tasks must be complete before authoring begins. The bank is the first proof that the project's pipeline produces actually-adopted, key-correct, accessible, unbiased open assessment content.
objective: Author and deliver the first complete question bank aligned to one OER unit, passing all M0 gates (license, machine, human sign-offs) and adopted by a beneficiary via an informal channel or self-serve fallback.
acceptanceCriteria: Pilot OER unit chosen with a realistic adoption path first (informal channel or self-serve fallback such as a GitHub PR to the OER repo or a tagged repo release with QTI/Moodle exports) and a clearly permissive license + non-regulated subject.
Source passed gate-003 (permits derivatives; no PII) with the gate artifact committed.
Blueprint committed: each stated learning objective of the unit listed with target item count and difficulty spread.
Items authored in the canonical model (quiz-bank-open-model-001) with correct answer keys, rationales (overall + per-distractor), scoring rules, alignment tags, and accessibility metadata.
Coverage >= 90% of the unit's stated learning objectives as recorded in the blueprint.
CI machine gate green: schema valid + grader self-test 100% pass + all quality and accessibility lints pass (quiz-bank-open-validator-006).
Human sign-offs recorded as committed artifacts: SME (key + rationale correct), license reviewer, accessibility reviewer, bias/sensitivity reviewer.

Bank adopted via the informal channel or self-serve fallback with the Steward's adoption evidence artifact (outcomes/<bank-id>.json: channel, URL/permalink, timestamp, coverage before/after) committed — or submitted with the specific blocker surfaced.
output: A complete, schema-valid, machine-gate-green, human-signed-off question bank for one OER unit, with adoption evidence artifact committed, exported to canonical JSON/CSV.
